caption: A Deep House track built on a foundation of a driving four-on kick drum with upbeat hi-hats, funky snare drums and percussions  and a female soulful mezzosoprano vocalist; the vibe is uplifting and happy
lyrics:
[Intro - Instrumental]

[Verse 1 - Instrumental]

[Chorus]
Its time for dancing
Let the music take control

Its time for dancing
Let the music take control

[Instrumental Break - drums and bassline only]

[Verse 2 - Instrumental]

[Chorus]
Its time for dancing
Let the music take control

Its time for dancing
Let the music take control

[Outro - Instrumental]
